query_normalized: understanding oceanic phytoplankton communities through remote sensing and oceanographic data ocean science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational methodology and canonical reference for the "Remote Sensing" component of the user's question, providing the essential survey of Vision-Language Models and datasets that a literature review on modern remote sensing applications would require. While it does not specifically focus on phytoplankton, it establishes the state-of-the-art techniques and data resources (criterion b) that are directly applicable to analyzing oceanic communities
